/etc/fail2ban/jail.local.content:
# fail2ban local overrides - devpolaris-bastion-03
[DEFAULT]
bantime  = 3600
findtime = 600
maxretry = 3
backend  = systemd

[sshd]
enabled  = true
port     = 2222
logpath  = /var/log/auth.log
maxretry = 3
bantime  = 3600
findtime = 600
